blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations affecting document readability.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all important portions.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete parts of the receipt/invoice.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements obstructing document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, item description, and total expenses. It also includes detailed breakdowns of expenses related to travel, such as hotel, train ticket, and taxi rides.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 7 out of 8 required fields, including detailed expense items, transaction amounts, and dates, confirming it as an expense document.

extraction.company_name: GOGLOBAL GEO Poland Sp. Z O.O.

issues.description: The receipt does not show the name of the vendor/merchant that provided the goods or services.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must show the name of the vendor/merchant that provided the goods or services

issues.description: The hotel expense exceeds the maximum allowable amount for domestic accommodation.
issues.recommendation: Domestic accommodation: amount for an overnight stay cannot exceed 20 times the amount of the allowance (PLN 900). If accommodation not provided and no bill submitted, entitled to lump-sum payment of 150% of the allowance.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Domestic accommodation: amount for an overnight stay cannot exceed 20 times the amount of the allowance (PLN 900). If accommodation not provided and no bill submitted, entitled to lump-sum payment of 150% of the allowance

issues.description: For mileage, a logbook must be submitted with the start/end date and time, reason for travel, location, and approval.
issues.recommendation: Please submit a mileage logbook with the start/end date and time, reason for travel, location, and approval.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: For mileage, a log book will need to be submitted. Must include: start/end (date and time), reason from travel, location and approval. This has to be documented in the vehicle mileage log kept by the employee

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing supplier business name, exceeding allowable hotel expenses, and missing mileage logbook. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with Poland's travel expense regulations.
